title: Market Brief — Friday, May 8, 2026
summary: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit in oversupply at 85% availability, H100s are adequate at 70%, but B200s are scarce at 25% and GB200s face severe shortage at just 10% with no tradeable spot price yet. H200 utilization cratered 24pp in 30 days to 64.9% even as H100 utilization surged to 96.3%, signaling aggressive workload migration to Blackwell and legacy Hopper repricing.
paragraphs: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit in oversupply at 85% availability, H100s are adequate at 70%, but B200s are scarce at 25% and GB200s face severe shortage at just 10% with no tradeable spot price yet. H200 utilization cratered 24pp in 30 days to 64.9% even as H100 utilization surged to 96.3%, signaling aggressive workload migration to Blackwell and legacy Hopper repricing.

Applying 1.25x TCO to spot costs, Llama 70B inference runs roughly $9.48/M on A100, $9.84/M on H100, and $11.90/M on MI300X, meaning any provider selling medium-tier tokens at $3/M is hemorrhaging cash. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.378/M output is selling at a loss of roughly $4.65/M tokens on B200s, the cheapest viable hardware. Grades: OpenAI Neutral, Anthropic Neutral, Google Strong, DeepSeek Burning Cash, Meta Burning Cash.

B200 spot at $4.20/hr with only 25% availability is undervalued relative to its margin profile, the only GPU where medium-tier inference approaches breakeven, so accumulate B200 capacity now. H200 at $3.00/hr spot but $4.02 OCPI with 87.5% annualized volatility and collapsing utilization is overvalued, sell or let leases expire.
bullets: 25% availability on B200s signals compute scarcity for next-gen workloads.
10% GB200 availability marks a severe shortage with zero price discovery.
96.3% H100 utilization is up 12.9pp in 30 days, the tightest in the stack.
$0.378/M output from DeepSeek V3.2 sits roughly 92% below TCO-adjusted B200 production cost.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means API pricing has fallen 78.6% since GPT-4 launch.
$80/M output for o3 Pro is 211x more expensive than DeepSeek V3.2 for the premium reasoning tier.
